name: CSLB B1 General Building Contractor License #960653
whatThisMeans: The license backs the bid. Salyers can hold a prime contract on multi-trade scopes, sub to a GC under their prime, or carry a project that requires coordination across structural and coatings work in one mobilization. Issued 2011, in good standing.
legal: License status is publicly verifiable through the California Contractors State License Board.

name: Henkel / LOCTITE Tyfo Certified Applicator
whatThisMeans: The work is installed under the system the design references. The engineer of record's drawings, the manufacturer's application drawings, and the installer's documentation form a coherent paper trail for the building official, the owner, and the warranty path. The Tyfo system is held by Henkel Corporation dba Fyfe.
legal: ICC-ES Evaluation Report ESR-2103 is publicly available from the ICC Evaluation Service.

name: Polymer Nation Trained Installer
whatThisMeans: System selection is grounded in the actual product line. The bid lists specific Polymer Nation products and references their data sheets. Field execution follows the manufacturer's published method, not a generic flooring trade approach. Training was completed in person at Polymer Nation's Chicago location.
legal: Polymer Nation product information is publicly available at polymernation.com.
